Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Q3 Bus Timetable - Al Maqta Bus Interchange · A to Al Maqta Bus Interchange · B

August 8, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transportation system provides an affordable and efficient way to travel across the city and its suburbs. One of the essential routes is the Q3 bus, which connects Al Maqta Bus Interchange A to Al Maqta Bus Interchange B. This route serves both commuters and leisure travelers, offering a seamless travel experience.

Operational Details

The Q3 bus operates consistently throughout the day, ensuring frequent service for passengers. Below are the key timings for the Q3 bus departing from both Al Maqta Bus Interchange A and Al Maqta Bus Interchange B:

From Al Maqta Bus Interchange · A From Al Maqta Bus Interchange · B

Bus Q3 Timetable

The Q3 bus runs every 10 minutes during operational hours, allowing passengers to travel with minimal wait times. For the full schedule, you can visit the AD Mobility official website or follow this link for Q3 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Payments for the Q3 bus are made using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for travel within one zone is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can conveniently top up their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks located throughout the city, ensuring a smooth and cash-free experience.

Route Overview

  1. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A Starting point for many travelers in the area.

  2. Al Maqta Bus Interchange B A central stop for further travel.

Accessibility and Services

The Q3 bus is designed to accommodate all passengers, ensuring a comfortable journey for everyone. The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access: Making it easy for passengers with mobility challenges.

  • Designated seating: Reserved for those with special needs.
  • Audio-visual aids: Supporting passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

This inclusive design ensures that everyone can enjoy Abu Dhabi’s public transport services.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Travelers on the Q3 bus can access several attractions and landmarks along the route: 1.

2.

  1. Louvre Abu Dhabi An art and civilization museum featuring exhibitions from around the world.

Journey Experience

On a recent trip aboard the Q3 bus from Al Maqta Bus Interchange A to B, the passenger enjoyed a delightful experience marked by punctuality and comfort. As the bus rolled through the city, the traveler was captivated by the lush greenery of the nearby Al Wathba Wetland Reserve, a haven for birdwatchers that hosts migratory flamingos.

The well-planned route allowed for convenient stops, with many riders alighting at the Etihad Towers, renowned for its luxury hotels and panoramic observation deck.

Travel Tips for Q3 Bus

  • Plan Ahead: Always check the bus timings to avoid unnecessary waiting, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick, cashless payments on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to enhance your travel experience.
  • Travel Off-Peak: If you prefer a quieter ride, avoid traveling during the busiest periods, typically in the morning and late afternoon.

In conclusion, the Q3 bus provides a reliable and convenient mode of transportation between Al Maqta Bus Interchange A and Al Maqta Bus Interchange B.

Whether you’re commuting for work, exploring local attractions, or simply enjoying the city, the Q3 bus guarantees a smooth and budget-friendly journey. Hop on and discover the diverse beauty of Abu Dhabi with ease! For more information on all available routes, be sure to check out the full Abu Dhabi bus list.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 8, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
